title: xyris spinulosa
intro: Xyris spinulosa, also known as the prickly yellow-eyed grass or spinulose xyris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. It is native to the southeastern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Xyris spinulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used in folk medicine and herbal remedies.
